name: Initialize Scrum Project with GitHub Projects
prompt: I'm starting a new project called 'auth-service' on GitHub. Set it up for Scrum using GitHub Projects: create a Project called 'Scrum Board' with custom fields (Status, Size, Estimate, Priority, Type, Sprint, Sprint Goal), create all the labels (type, priority, size, status namespaces), and configure the first Sprint iteration starting next Monday for 14 days. The repo is mycompany/auth-service.

assertions.text: Creates a GitHub Project using gh project create command
Creates type:* labels (type:feature, type:bug, type:chore, etc.) using gh label create
Creates size:* labels (size:xs, size:s, size:m, size:l, size:xl)
Mentions custom fields (Status, Size, Estimate, Priority, Type, Sprint, Sprint Goal)
Configures Sprint iteration field with duration and start date
All gh commands shown are syntactically valid (no made-up flags)
Covers all 4 namespaces: type, priority, size, status
